programmes.show_name: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programmes.show_description: Investigators seek a fare dodger thought to be scamming Transport for London with over £5,000 in unpaid fares. And a man caught without a valid ticket proves uncooperative.
In Northamptonshire, Colin deals with a car that has ran out of petrol near Watford services, and in Skye, recovery driver Cara is out to collect a car with a punctured tyre. (Ep8)
Student Sandeep hopes to collect his BMW after a collision which left him injured. But without a log book, the car pound fees will continue to rise before he can come back to collect. (Ep9)
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A patient in police custody is brought in for treatment to a split eyebrow and facial wounds. On arrival, the patient is aggressive towards police and unreceptive to procedures.
A young woman is admitted after sustaining a nasty injury falling off a bar stool in Hull. A man seeks help after blacking out while mopping the floor.
...Man Ever. Joey's duck swallows Ross's wedding ring. Phoebe suffers extreme mood swings because of her pregnancy.
Observational documentary series following vets in Thurso and Wick. Gregor the boar needs a precautionary procedure on his tusks.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
...Friends: Big World! Big Adventures! When Nia derails because she has never learned to read numbers, Annie and Clarabel decide to teach her. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Nanny Plum conjures up a hamster called Pippin for the twins. However, the naughty new pet is soon causing chaos in the castle. (VS)
Chloe's Big Friends: Peppa and George go to play with their cousin Chloe and her friends, but the older children don't want to play any childish games.
Gym Class: Madame Gazelle takes the children to Grampy Rabbit's gym class, where they learn how to be real explorers.
A bored Fluff discovers a wooden ruler while waiting for Tweedy to play with him. It gives Tweedy an idea for some seesaw fun that they can both enjoy! (Ep29)
When Squiggle discovers three golden coins in his piggy bank, he wonders what he could do with them... Badger and Scratch's juice stand turns out to be the perfect, bubbly solution. (Ep16)
...Big Adventures! The engines get a taste of the future, but Gordon somehow ends up being turned into a giant magnet.
Peppa and her family collect apples and blackberries in Granny and Grandpa Pig's garden so that they can make a pie.
Paddington is the judge at the Windsor Gardens Pet Show, but they're all so talented. How can he choose a winner?
When Pip becomes obsessed with his 'get well soon' card for Posy, she shows him that just being able to spend time with him is the very best gift of all.
Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.
Peppa learns that Mummy Pig used to keep a diary when she was her age, so Peppa decides to give it a try.
Grandpa Pig and Grandad Dog are on their boats when Grandpa Pig drops an anchor on his foot! After an x-ray and plaster cast at the hospital, Grandpa Pig needs to stay overnight.
Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.
Tracker and Carlos come across a series of nocturnal animals fleeing the Shadow Jungle. Tracker, with Ryder and the pups' help, must brave his fear of the dark and stop new villain Lucita Mala.

programmes.show_name: Peppa Pig: Around the World Special
programmes.show_description: When Peppa's family car breaks down, Miss Rabbit lends them her plane and they find themselves swept off on an adventure all around the world.
Join David and friends, as they use their senses to explore the world around them. David discovers all about the sense of sight, and how it helps us understand the world around us.
Kiera reads a story in which Jacki and Mama are learning Sign Language as Mama is losing her hearing. But how can Jacki enjoy listening to music when her Mama can no longer hear it?
Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

National and international news.
Epic adventure starring Laurence Olivier and Harry Hamlin. Based on the myths of ancient Greece, Perseus, son of Zeus, must face a range of challenges to save Andromeda. (1981)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Epic adventure starring Laurence Olivier and Harry Hamlin. Based on the myths of ancient Greece, Perseus, son of Zeus, must face a range of challenges to save Andromeda. (1981)

Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
This stunning film showcases extraordinary wildlife off Devon and Cornwall as Rupert and Henry Kirkwood document sea life, including dolphins and giant Atlantic Blue Fin tuna.
Susan tours the north of England, a land forever linked to Wallace and Gromit, sticking to Yorkshire, where stunning Dales scenery, friendly faces and surprising local traditions await.
The interceptors are after a man wanted on suspicion of making threats to kill, who could be armed, and Coups and police dog Rambo are on the lookout for a suspected shoplifter.

programmes.show_name: New: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programmes.show_description: A woman pulled over for driving without a full licence has her own theories as why she's been stopped. And reports come in of a car that's linked to drugs.
Ben sets on a journey of wonder to see China's staggering sights and meet its biggest characters, delving into an epic 3000-year tale - from ancient temples to glittering modern cities. (Ep1/3)
Police race to catch a violent suspect hiding in gardens. A drug driver, a collapsed man, and a man throwing eggs in a Tesco car park keep officers busy during a dramatic night.
A look at how the UK's 11,000 Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR) cameras assist in identifying offenders, including police units chasing a suspected disqualified driver.
A reckless driver gives Sergeant Steve the slip in bad weather. Ben has a run-in with an argumentative drink driver who fails three breath tests.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A woman is rushed in after her motorbike collided with a deer. A bodybuilder fears an accident in the gym may curtail his ambition to be crowned Hull's strongest man.
A patient brought into A&E by police claims to have swallowed drugs, but he refuses to co-operate with staff, putting the NHS under further pressure.
Ross, Chandler, Joey and Monica go to London for Ross's wedding. Rachel realises that she is still in love with Ross and races to join them.
Observational documentary series following vets in Thurso and Wick. Vet Ken must examine bulls Peter and Paul on a family-run farm that breeds pedigrees.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
...Friends: Big World! Big Adventures! Thomas is terrified when he is given the honour of bringing a dragon to the Chinese New Year celebrations. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: King Thistle competes with the elves to build a rocket that can fly all the way to the moon. (VS)
Mrs Zebra teaches Peppa, George, Zoe, Zaza and Zuzu Zebra how to make a real tea set from clay.
Paper Aeroplanes: Some of Daddy Pig's important work papers have gone missing because Mummy Pig, Peppa and George have accidentally made them into paper aeroplanes!
It's hard to understand what a Fluff wants. The only thing Tweedy can do is keep guessing until he gets the right answer. (Ep30)
Squiggle and Magnus play peekaboo with a star, and just when they think the game is over, the star jumps back out again. Upon his return to the treehouse, Fluff jumps out of her own box. (Ep17)
...Big Adventures! Thomas travels to the land down under, where he helps his friend Ace overcome his fear of animals so that he can compete in Australia's Super Stunt Rally.
When Joe, Peter and Mike go up the mountain without their coats, a sunny day turns bad fast, and Mike gets injured.
Peppa and her friends go to help at Edmond Elephant's birthday party, but the little children are harder to look after than they expected.
...Kamalis. Paddington, Judy and Jonathan learn that playing with your neighbours is more fun than trying to outdo them, even if Toq keeps copying their ideas!
Pip and Posy are the Wishing Fairies, making all their friends' wishes come true. But can they fulfil Jamila's greatest wish to fly with all her bird friends?
A long-lost letter inspires Ms Marjorie to visit an old surfing buddy. The pups spring into action when a nearby volcano erupts!
Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo - until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback!
George and Peppa spend the day playing golf with Grandpa Pig, but they are much more interested in the colourful minigolf course next door.
Grandpa Pig found his night at the hospital so comfortable, he's reluctant to leave! Peppa and Suzy volunteers to nurse him at home and make sure he's as comfortable as in hospital.
Tim tries to return a lost walky talky to its owner.
When a penguin takes a shine to Stink's bed, and Grumblestunk decides to open a zoo, Brody is unimpressed, so Stan and Gran are forced to investigate!
Julius and Julia get into a sticky situation when the paper bag puppets they created for a puppet show become stuck on the antlers of a deer!
Milo says a robot is only as good as its programming. But when our trio build a robot to keep the birds away from Farmer Tilly's fields, they somehow end up scaring the whole town!
The Wise Old Elf comes up with a cunning plan to stop the squirrels from storing their acorns in his tree.
Piggy in the Middle. Peppa is teasing George because he can't catch a ball properly, so Mummy Pig suggests a game called Piggy in the Middle to help him learn.
First, the campers find Odo cute and funny, but Odo wants to be spooky, so with the help of a timid mouse, he plays a trick on the campers that they'll never forget.
Come and explore with David as he discovers all about the sense of hearing, and how it helps us understand the world around us.
Join Jen for a story in which the heroic pups team up with their new merpup friend Coral after Mayor Humdinger causes deep-sea chaos. Will the gang save the day?

Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.
National and international news.
Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.
Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!
Rags-to-riches saga following the lives, loves and fortunes of the working-class Hardacre family as they move from a grimy fish dock to a vast country estate in 1890s Yorkshire.
The series following those who've traded the UK for a sunnier and more lucrative life on the Spanish Costas, including Colin the Benidorm drag queen.
Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
The felling and fate of the Sycamore Gap tree caused sorrow among the public. But this film shows some of the inspiring responses to the loss of the century-old landmark.
Susan explores the beautiful Cotswolds - the inspiration for romantic novelist Jilly Cooper. Susan visits Bisley, which was home to the author, Tewkesbury Abbey and Sudeley Castle.
With expert insight and moving personal stories, this insightful documentary follows four people as they reveal the reality of obsessive-compulsive disorder, from terrifying thoughts to rituals.
A large African leopard tortoise struggles to walk on sore back legs and needs Peter Wright's help. Julian Norton faces a Kunekune pig. And vets and farmers compete on darts night!
Ben dives into rural China's epic story, embarking on a journey of wonder across Sichuan and Yunnan: taking in Taoism, a search for the giant panda, rice terraces and tea mountains. (Ep2/3)

programmes.show_name: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programmes.show_description: Revenue Protection officer Sam from South Western Railway is cornered and verbally abused on a train to Feltham when a man without a ticket insists on confronting her on his journey.
